falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match is broken; a new high this quickly after the signal invalidates the bearish bottoming structure and suggests accumulation rather than distribution

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.50 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 39 indicated residual fear/uncertainty; sustained sub-12.5 VIX demonstrates complacency has fully returned, invalidating the 'HOLD' defensive posture as unnecessary

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while S&P 500 simultaneously rises more than 2% from current levels
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This divergent 'bad news is good news' dynamic contradicts the 2024 August bottom analog, which featured yields and equities falling together; it signals a Fed pivot narrative that breaks the pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
